title: Amtech G0800 75mm (3") Heavy Duty Scraper with Wooden Handle
features: DURABLE: This 75mm (3") heavy duty scraper has a stainless steel blade and a strong hardwood handle with brass rivets
VERSATILE: It is ideal for scraping off flaky paint or applying filler
SIZE CAPACITY: 3 inch / 75 mm range ideal for household and trade applications
ERGONOMIC GRIP: Comfortable to hold for better control
DIY & TRADE USE: Reliable choice for both professionals and home projects
description: Product Description Am-Tech heavy duty scraper. Stainless steel blade. Hardwood handle with brass rivets. Measures 3-inch. Display packed.Am Tech provides a 12 Month guarantee on all their products. Am Tech only use the best materials in their products to provide a product that meets your expectations Safety Warning No Box Contains 1x Scraper See more
